title: Adobe App Builder app
description: Scaffolds a new Adobe App Builder app

name.description: App name (kebab-case, used as directory name and package name suffix)
name.x-prompt: What is the app name? (kebab-case, e.g. 'my-app')

displayName.description: Human-readable display name (defaults to title-cased app name)

hasAdminUI.description: Does the app need a Commerce admin UI (custom pages, sidebar menu items)?
hasAdminUI.x-prompt: Will the app add an admin UI in Commerce (custom pages or menu items)?

sidebarCategory.description: Commerce admin sidebar category for the menu item (only used when hasAdminUI=true). Prompted when hasAdminUI=true and the value isn't passed on the CLI.

hasBusinessConfig.description: Does the app expose business configuration in the Commerce admin?
hasBusinessConfig.x-prompt: Will the app store business configuration?

hasCommerceWebhooks.description: Will the app receive Adobe Commerce webhooks? Implies the commerce lib (app management) is required.
hasCommerceWebhooks.x-prompt: Will the app receive Adobe Commerce webhooks?

hasEvents.description: Will the app subscribe to Adobe IO events?
hasEvents.x-prompt: Will the app subscribe to Adobe IO events?

hasRestActions.description: Will the app expose custom REST actions?
hasRestActions.x-prompt: Will the app expose custom REST actions?

hasScheduledActions.description: Will the app run scheduled (cron-triggered) actions?
hasScheduledActions.x-prompt: Will the app run scheduled actions?

hasCustomInstallSteps.description: Does the app need custom installation steps? (only relevant when commerce extensions are used)
hasCustomInstallSteps.x-prompt: Does the app need custom installation steps?
